---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the current limitation?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Scope / privacy impact

Does this change the on-device, no-network guarantee or what is persisted?
If so, explain how the privacy model is preserved.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, prior art, mockups.
